messages.content: who are you?
I am an AI language model developed by OpenAI and designed to answer questions and assist with tasks.

now u r a professional translator, specialize in translating English to Chinese, plz translate the texts I am going to give and translate them into a native-speaker-like language style, the translated version must conform the Chinese linguistics styles. If u understand my instructions, plz reply me "ok"
OK, I understand your instructions. Please provide me with the English text you want me to translate into Chinese.
Some are now beginning to surmise that a complete restoration is impossible
有些人现在开始猜测完全恢复是不可能的。

These are beginning to perceive that the national and international organizations in the course of construction to meet the demands of the world conflict must form the model for a future social structure;
这些人正在开始领悟，在建设过程中满足世界冲突需求的国家和国际组织，必须形成未来社会结构的模型；
It may be argued that war compels socialization, that after the war the world will perforce return to materialistic individualism.
可以说，战争强制实现社会化，战后世界必须必然回归到唯物主义的个人主义，这是一个可以争论的观点。
It may be argued that war compels socialization, that after the war the world will perforce return to materialistic individualism.
可以​认为战争促进了社会化，而战后世界则不得不回归唯物主义的个人主义。
it is essential for us as a people not to abandon our faith in man, our belief that not only the exceptional individual but the majority of mankind can be socialized.
对我们作为一个民族来说，重要的是不要放弃对人的信仰，相信不仅个别的杰出人物，而且大多数的人都可以社会化。
education is merely a cultural leaven within the reach of the comparatively few who can afford to attend a university.
教育只是文化的酵母，仅限于有能力上大学的少数人。

It is characteristic of those who put their faith in might alone that they are not only blind to the finer relationships between individuals and nations, but take no account of the moral forces in human affairs which in the long run are decisive,—a lack of sensitiveness which explains Germany's colossal blunders.
那些只信仰力量的人的特点是，他们不仅看不到个人与国家之间的微妙关系，而且没有考虑到人类事务中在长期内决定性的道德力量，这种缺乏敏感性可以解释德国巨大的失误。
Let us have faith always that it is coming, and struggle on, highly resolving that those who gave their lives in the hour of darkness shall not have died in vain.
让我们始终相信，希望即将到来，努力奋斗，并高度决心，让那些在黑暗时刻献出生命的人不会白白牺牲。

It would indeed fare ill with democracy if, in such an era, men of large business proved to be lacking in democratic initiative, wholly unreceptive and hostile to the gradual introduction of democracy into industry, which means the perpetuation of the American Idea.
如果在这样一个时代，大商家们证明他们缺乏民主精神和主动性，完全无法接受和敌对于将民主逐步引入工业中去，这将对民主产生不良影响，而“美国理念”的实现也就无从谈起。

And, it must be said of this profession, which hitherto has held a foremost place in America, that its leaders have never hesitated to respond to a public call, to sacrifice their practices to serve the nation.
而且必须说，这个职业迄今在美国一直处于领先地位，其领袖从来没有犹豫过回应公众的呼声，为了服务国家而牺牲自己的实践。
Every normal child is supposed to have a special "distinction" or gift, which it is the task of the educator to discover.
每个正常的孩子都应该有特别的“特点”或天赋，而教育者的任务就是去发现它。
It is based on what is known as modern social science, which has as its ultimate sanction the nature of the human mind as revealed by psychology.
它基于被称为现代社会科学的知识，该学科的终极基础是由心理学揭示的人类心理本质。
To this Empire will be added the precious culture of France, which the courage of her sons will have preserved, the contributions of Italy, and of Russia, yes, and of Japan.
这个帝国将加入法国珍贵的文化，这是她儿子勇敢的保护所得，还有意大利、俄罗斯甚至日本所提供的贡献。
our problem today, which the new system undertakes, is to produce character with open-mindedness—the kind of character possessed by many great scientists.
我们今天面临的问题，也是新体制承担的问题，就是要培养具有开放心态的性格——这种性格许多伟大的科学家都拥有。
The German system, which has been bent upon installing authoritative conviction instead of encouraging freedom of thought, should be a warning to us.
德国的体制一直致力于安装官方信仰而不是鼓励思想自由，这对我们应该是一个警示。
New discoveries, which come upon us with such bewildering rapidity, are apt abruptly to alter social and industrial conditions, while morals and conventions are no longer absolute.
新发现以惊人的速度降临在我们身上，往往会突然改变社会和工业条件，而道德和传统已不再是绝对的。
In the first place, it has been authoritative rather than scientific, which is to say that students have been induced to accept the statements of teachers and text books
首先，它一直是以权威而不是科学为基础的，这意味着学生被诱导接受教师和教科书的言论。
The prevailing system of education, which we have inherited from the past, largely fails to accomplish this.
我们从过去继承而来的主流教育体系，在很大程度上未能实现这一目标。
